title: Daily builds of skopeoimage produce new images each time (when no changes in base image or skopeo binary)
body:
Currently, image builds are not idempotent (for example `quay.io/skopeo/stable:latest` image):

```sh
# using container-diff from https://github.com/GoogleContainerTools/container-diff

sudo container-diff diff daemon://quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:$PREV_HASH daemon://quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:$CUR_HASH --type=file

-----File-----

These entries have been added to quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:$PREV_HASH: None

These entries have been deleted from quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:$PREV_HASH: None

These entries have been changed between quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:$PREV_HASH and quay.io/skopeo/stable@sha256:$CUR_HASH:
FILE                                                               SIZE1        SIZE2
/usr/lib/sysimage/rpm/rpmdb.sqlite                                 8.6M         8.6M
/var/lib/dnf/history.sqlite-wal                                    3.9M         3.9M
/etc/pki/ca-trust/extracted/java/cacerts                           158K         158K
/var/lib/dnf/history.sqlite                                        132K         132K
/var/lib/dnf/history.sqlite-shm                                    32K          32K
/etc/shadow                                                        504B         504B
/etc/shadow-                                                       475B         475B
/var/log/hawkey.log                                                240B         240B
/etc/machine-id                                                    33B          33B
/var/lib/dnf/repos/fedora-376ef8e983c65ce0/countme                 26B          12B
/var/lib/dnf/repos/updates-modular-29738c1a65877bb4/countme        26B          12B
/var/lib/dnf/repos/updates-b7ba662710b98f1a/countme                12B          12B
```

comments.body:
Thanks for your report.

I think the idea is to rebuild the `stable` image whenever Fedora, or Skopeo, contains any new updated RPM. There might be  something practical we can do to avoid publishing images with no changes.
